pattern: A reachability DP over indices uses a sliding window prefix count so each zero position is reachable when some reachable index lies in its valid jump window.
hints: Index zero is reachable; an index is reachable only if it holds a zero and some earlier reachable index sits within the jump range.
Naively scanning the whole window per index is too slow; maintain a running count of reachable indices inside the moving window.
Let reach[i] be true when s[i] is zero and the count of reachable indices in [i-maxJump, i-minJump] is positive; slide that window with a prefix sum.

edge_inputs.description: last index is a one so unreachable
gap larger than maxJump blocks progress

stress.description: random binary strings forced to start with zero, random valid jump bounds
stress.generator_python:
def gen(rng, size):
    n = rng.randint(2, max(2, size))
    chars = ['0'] + [rng.choice('01') for _ in range(n - 1)]
    s = ''.join(chars)
    mn = rng.randint(1, n - 1)
    mx = rng.randint(mn, n - 1)
    return [s, mn, mx]
